prompt_template: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a cute girl hacker in a cyberpunk city at night, with [hair_color] hair, [eye_color] eyes, wearing a black cropped hoodie with [logo_back] glowing on the back, black pleated skirt, thigh-high stockings, fingerless gloves, and over-ear headphones with [headphone_logo]. She is in a [pose] pose, pointing at a holographic [logo_hologram] with one hand, holding a tablet or laptop showing [screen_content] in the other. Background: neon-lit futuristic cityscape with tall buildings and digital elements. Style: [art_style], [mood], high resolution, intricate details, vibrant colors, dynamic lighting.

hair_color.description: Color of the girl's hair, often matching the theme color of the [it_project].
hair_color.example: Main Color or Full Palette for [ip_project]

eye_color.description: Color of the girl's eyes,/*  */ typically red, blue, or brown to match the energetic or thematic vibe.

logo_back.description: The logo or symbol on the back of the hoodie, representing the IT project, program, or organization

headphone_logo.description: Optional logo on the headphones, sometimes matching the main logo or a variant.

logo_hologram.description: The holographic symbol she is pointing at, usually the same as the logo_back but in a glowing, floating form.

screen_content.description: The command or code displayed on the tablet/laptop screen, relevant to the IT theme

pose.description: The girl's pose, typically dynamic like sitting or standing with one leg bent, looking over shoulder.
pose.example: sitting on edge, looking back at viewer, pointing forward

art_style.description: Overall artistic style, such as anime, cyberpunk, detailed digital art.
art_style.example: anime, cyberpunk, highly detailed, by artist like Ilya Kuvshinov

mood.description: Emotional tone of the image (e.g., determined, cute, serious).

clothing_details.description: Additional clothing elements (e.g., red trim on skirt, tech accessories).
example: black pleated skirt with red edges
fingerless black gloves with red accents

accessories.description: Extra items like wristbands, belts, or gadgets.

background_elements.description: Specific background features to enhance the cyberpunk theme.

lighting.description: Lighting effects (e.g., neon glow, volumetric lighting).
lighting.example: neon orange glow from logos, blue city lights

color_scheme.description: Dominant colors matching the IT theme

resolution.description: Desired image resolution or quality level.

composition.description: Image composition (e.g., three-quarter view, from behind).

facial_expression.description: Detailed facial expression (e.g., slight pout, confident smile).
facial_expression.example: determined with a hint of cuteness

hair_style.example: short orange hair with side-swept bangs

additional_prompt_modifiers.description: Extra keywords for AI generation (e.g., masterpiece, best quality).

negative_prompt.description: Elements to avoid in generation (e.g., blurry, low quality).
